title: vimhjkl Locale File Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating vimhjkl i18n locale overlay files. Each locale file provides translated strings for the skills curriculum, keyed by skill_id. All fields are optional overlays — missing entries fall back to the English source.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale identifier (e.g. zh-CN, fr, de). Used for runtime lookup and CI validation.

source_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the English skills.json that this translation was generated from. Used by CI to detect curriculum changes.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this locale file was last generated or updated.

glossary.description: Consistent term translation glossary. Maps English Vim terms to their locale-specific translations. Used by CI validation to ensure terminology consistency across all skill entries.

skills.description: Translated skill overlays, keyed by skill_id. Each key must match the skill_id format used in skills.json.

challenge_overlay.description: Partial overlay for a single challenge entry. Only translatable fields (hint, why) are included; data fields (start, goal, solution, par_keys, target, etc.) are NOT present.

hint.description: Translated hint text for this challenge.

why.description: Translated explanation text explaining why this technique is effective.

skill_overlay.description: Partial overlay for a single skill. All fields are optional — only those present in the overlay will be applied at runtime.

teach.description: Translated teaching text / explanation for this skill.

key_commands.description: Translated or reordered key command list for display. The individual keystrokes themselves must remain in raw Vim notation.

challenges.description: Translated challenge overlays. The array index corresponds to the position in the English skills.json challenges array.
